name: Industry Trend Digest
description: Each Monday it scans what is happening in your industry and sends a short digest of what changed and why it matters to you. Keeps you current without an hour of reading every week.
prompt_template: Scan recent news, discussions, and developments in my industry from the past week. Pull out the handful of things that actually matter to a business like mine and write a short digest, with a line on each one about why it matters and anything I might want to do about it. Skip the noise. Give it to me as a draft I can read in a couple of minutes.
